message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'rcu_head_init' sets signal field 'callback_head.func', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=callback_head;field=func;offset=8] [oracle:assert=callback_head.func stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets func without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
